reasoned_about_structure.evidence: Little independent structural reasoning; chased scattered, sometimes contradictory advisor suggestions without forming a coherent model of the lr-bs surface.

formed_tested_hypotheses.evidence: No sustained hypothesis - each step reacted to the latest advisor hint, so the search ping-ponged across the grid without convergent testing.

exploration_quality.evidence: Sampled broadly across both axes but never settled into the optimum basin; finished at lr=2.762e-3/bs=2048 (regret 0.0187).

bifurcation_point: Accepting noisy advisor suggestions step-by-step instead of consolidating the early high-lr/large-bs signal into a focused local search around the high-lr ridge.
bifurcation_reasoning: After exp 3 the agent had its best point in the high-lr/large-bs corner and could have pushed lr higher at large bs; instead it let the advisor scatter it. Failing to localize was an avoidable error, not an information gap.
justification: A noisy advisor produced wandering rather than a freeze; the agent never consolidated its early high-lr signal. Ended one ridge off the optimum (0.0187) with no coherent hypothesis driving the trajectory.
